doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is fabricated: it post-dates my knowledge cutoff, misattributes a 2014 guidance to the EDPB (which only existed from 2018), and its core legal position contradicts established GDPR recital 26 doctrine on pseudonymized data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 96
REASON: No EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists as of my knowledge cutoff; the document contains anachronistic references (October 2025 workshop, March 2026 adoption date), misattributes "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB did not exist until 2018), and the §2 legal position contradicts established GDPR recital 26 doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data for the controller, making this a fabricated document regardless of its authentic institutional register.
